## What changed

Describe the coherent change in this pull request.

## Why

Link the business objective, issue, or decision record.

## Impact

Identify affected customers, operations, competition rules, finances, risk controls, data, or systems.

## Validation

List reviews, calculations, tests, link checks, or stakeholder confirmations performed.

## Approval checklist

- [ ] Confirmed facts, proposals, and assumptions are clearly separated
- [ ] Related decision register entries and documents are updated
- [ ] No credentials, personal data, signed documents, or confidential incident details are included
- [ ] Legal, safety, financial, brand, and technical review obtained where applicable
- [ ] Customer-facing commitments are consistent across documents and systems
